claim_boundary: This test result covers only the local examples and explicit SkillGuard command invocations run by this script. It does not prove broad fixture coverage, packaged CLI installation, suite automation, package publication, release readiness, code-contract validation, external services, or future AI behavior.

evidence.summary: Ran 5 unittest checks using the local Python interpreter.
Checked examples/README.md for local command names and public-safe wording.
